query: How do I get our product page cited by ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews?
expected_behavior: Addresses GEO as a separate visibility channel from organic search rankings
Checks the 5 GEO dimensions: Citability, Structural Readability, Multi-Modal Content, Authority/Brand Signals, Technical Accessibility
Asks or confirms whether AI crawlers (GPTBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot) are allowed in robots.txt
Recommends a 134-167 word self-contained answer block on the page
Recommends an llms.txt file at the root domain
